personal.name: Subhajit Biswas
personal.title: Full Stack Developer
personal.tagline: Building interfaces by day, architecting backends by night.
personal.bio: I'm a full-stack developer with a year of crafting dynamic Angular applications and a growing passion for Python Flask backends. I love the complete picture — from pixel-perfect UIs to clean, scalable APIs.

journey.title: Started Angular
journey.description: Joined my current role and dove deep into Angular — components, services, RxJS, routing. Frontend became my craft.

journey.title: First Production Deployment
journey.description: Shipped a feature-complete Angular module used by real users. Learned the full SDLC in a professional setting.

journey.title: Ventured into Backend
journey.description: Curiosity led me to Python and Flask. Started building REST APIs, understanding the server side of every request.

journey.title: Full Stack Mindset
journey.description: Connected the dots — Angular consuming Flask APIs I built myself. The complete picture clicked.

experience.description: Working on Angular-based frontend applications and contributing to Python Flask backends. Involved in the full development lifecycle from requirements to deployment.
highlights: Built and maintained Angular modules consumed by production users
Developed REST APIs with Python Flask for internal services
Collaborated with cross-functional teams using Agile methodology
Improved page load performance by optimizing component rendering

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: This very portfolio — built with Angular 17, driven by a single JSON data file so content updates never require touching HTML.

projects.title: Flask REST API
projects.description: A RESTful API built with Python Flask featuring JWT authentication, SQLite persistence, and Postman-tested endpoints.
